task: Produce a reproducible accumulation stress analysis workbook and an expert underwriting memo using only the provided embedded data packet. Build a decision table (baseline, mitigated, sensitivity) that quantifies tail accumulation and recommended underwriting actions, ensure any recommended mitigation stays within the provided budget and yields at least a 10% improvement in the controlling metric, mark any contradictory or under-supported records as needs_review, preserve intermediate calculations (formulas or executable logic), include record-level citations, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final recommendation table suitable for expert review.
